# Hesed — a private investment holding company

Hesed is a private investment holding company based in Boulder, Colorado. The name "hesed" comes from the Hebrew word חֶסֶד, meaning loving-kindness — a steadfast, covenantal kind of love, measured in what you actually do for another person.

## Holdings

- [Pipestaff](https://pipestaff.com) (software) — performance-based caregiver lead generation for home care agencies
- [Colorado CareAssist](https://coloradocareassist.com) (services) — licensed Colorado home care agency (License #04Y296)

## Giving

- [Hesed Foundation](http://www.hesedfoundation.org/) — separate philanthropy built on the same idea

## Contact

- Phone: (303) 757-1777
- Address: 1911 11th St, Fl 2, Boulder, CO 80302
